overview.short: Mangi-Tungi is a prominent twin-pinnacled peak and Digambar Jain Pilgrimage Site, located near Tahrabad about 125 km from Nashik, Maharashtra, India.
overview.description: Mangi-Tungi is a prominent twin-pinnacled peak and Digambar Jain Pilgrimage Site, located near Tahrabad about 125 km from Nashik, Maharashtra, India. Mangi, 4,343 ft (1,324 m) high above sea level, is the western pinnacle and Tungi, 4,366 ft (1,331 m) high, the eastern. Mangi-Tungi is 30 km (19 mi) from the city of Satana.

topPlaces.name: Satana, India
topPlaces.description: Satana is a town and a municipal council in Nashik District in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is in the taluka of Baglan, which is sometimes called Satana, because of the city's dominance in the taluka.

topPlaces.name: Deola
topPlaces.description: Deola is a taluka of Nashik district in Maharashtra, India. It is weekly market for surrounding villages.

items.note: Satana is a town and a municipal council in Nashik District in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is in the taluka of Baglan, which is sometimes called Satana, because of the city's dominance in the taluka.
Deola is a taluka of Nashik district in Maharashtra, India. It is weekly market for surrounding villages.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mangi-Tungi?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mangi-Tungi is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

The nearest airport is Shirdi Airport (101 km) and the nearest railway station is Nashik Road (81 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mangi-Tungi?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mangi-Tungi at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mangi-Tungi?
faq.a: Stays in Mangi-Tungi start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mangi-Tungi?
faq.a: The top attractions are Satana, India, Deola.
